description_long: This chest of drawers is a classic, rectangular piece of furniture with a smooth, painted finish and a traditional design. The front features three rows of drawers, each row containing four drawers, for a total of twelve, all equipped with ornate, dark metal handles. The base is adorned with a carved decorative motif and stands on four short, curved legs, adding an elegant touch. The sides and back are plain, with the back panel being completely flat and unadorned. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of wood, with metal hardware for the handles.
description: A classic, painted wooden chest of drawers with ornate handles and decorative carvings, standing on four curved legs. It features twelve drawers and a broad, flat top surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing twelve drawers with ornate handles and decorative carvings at the base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat side panel and the profile of the curved legs.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely flat, undecorated back panel and the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain side panel and curved legs visible.
